/CAL CALARIFICATION OF CERTIFICATION TO JUVENILE COURT/ /INTC/X DEFENDANTS TRUE NAME IS JEYSON JOSUE CRUZMEDINA/TEXT:COURT CERTIFIES DEFT TO JUVENILE JUSTICE CENTER/JJC1:JEYSON JOSUE CRUZMEDINA/JJC3:06-12-2002/X:THE COURT ORDERS AND CERTIFICATES MATTER TO THE JUVENILE COURT,/CO:DATE OF THE ALLEGED OFFENSE 01-09-2019/JJC IN:01-18-19/X:THE MINOR IS ORDERED DETAINED,/X:THE COURT REITERATES DETENTION ORDERS AND FINDINGS FROM 01-14-19,/X:THE COURT FINDS THAT A PRIMA FACIE SHOWING HAS BEEN MADE THAT MINOR COMES WITHIN WIC 602,/X:THE MINOR IS DETAINED BECAUSE: 1)THE MINOR HAS VIOLATED A COURT ORDER, 2)THE MINOR HAS ESCAPED FROM A PREVIOUS COMMITMENT, 3)THE MINORIS LIKELY TOFLEE IF RELEASED, 4)DETENTION IS NECESSARY TO PROTECT THE MINOR, 5)DETENTION IS NECESSARY TO PROTECT THE PERSON OR PROPERTY OF ANOTHER,//X:THE COURT FURTHER FINDS THAT: 1) REASONABLE EFFORTS HAVE BEEN MADE TO PREVENT OR LIMINATE THE NEED FOR REMOVING THE MINOR FROM HIS HOME AND TO MAKEIT POSSIBLE FOR THE MINOR TO RETURN HOME, 2) A RETURN OF THE MINOR TO HIS HOME WOULD BE CONTRARY TO HIS WELFARE, 3) TEMPORARY PLACEMENT AND CARE IS VESTED WITH THE JUVENILE PROBATION DEPT, PENDINGDISPOSITION OR FURTHER ORDEROF THE COURT, 4)THE COURT ALSO FINDS THAT A CONTINUANCE IN THE HOME IS CONTRARY TO MINOR'S WELFARE,/CONTD:FURTHER PROCEEDINGS AT JJC ON 01-18-19 IN DEPARTMENT 3/
